title: Monte Holiday Ecoturismo+Bosque - Regenerative tourism to prevent forest fires
description: An adaptive forest management approach is integrated into a campsite ecotourism project in the Sierra de Madrid to prevent forest fires and utilize biomass for onsite energy. The initiative combines selective silvicultural treatments, extensive livestock grazing, and a hybrid solar/biomass heating network to enhance forest resilience, achieve a neutral carbon footprint, and produce renewable thermal energy.
